messages.content: Yes definitely chatters are extremely important and our chatters are some of the best in the world. We have American based chatters as well as overseas chatters but honestly any chatter that works with us speaks better English than I do and Iâm from the US haha. But I totally agree they can make or break the user experience and also mess up your revenue.

Thatâs wonderful to hear, do you have a team website or company name things are ran under? Any references of creators that work with you? Iâm also curious to hear where you source your chatters, as it does make a big impact on the overall experience given to customers.

Hey there. Yes we work with a bout 22 creators right now. Many are yourubers, social media personalities, or athletes. Specifically, we work with creators who tend to go viral more often than not. I saw some of your reels and they were great. 

We are based bicoastal and do full in house oftv, reels editing, and curate our marketing differently to each creator. Would love to hear your experiences with management and how your page has done for the last year. Our chat team is also one of the best in the world. Iâve seen so many other agencies ruin a page because of their chatting and the way they handle each creators marketing. About 18 out of 22 of our creators are well within the top 1%!
Liked a message
Hi Joshua, thanks for reaching out! I do currently work with an agency but am open to hearing more about your offer. Looking forward to hearing from you!

Hey! Love the content! I actually manage some of the top creators on OF and Telegram (mostly within the top 1% and some in the top .1%)! We specialize in 360 marketing and work with a select group of niche creators and other creators we know we can scale. What are you doing for marketing right now? We manage a bunch of platforms and have many systems in place for our creators, which most agencies donât do. This includes full chat team and managers, IG, Reddit, X, Telgram and we do OFTV creation and content houses every month or two. Would love to talk about you joining our team. You have a great page and I think we could scale you a lot. Plus we have a competitive commission scale. Let me know if you want to setup a phone call or group chat with my team to discuss what we can do! We have all female account management as well and our teams based between Palm Beach and LA! Let me know if you have any questions. Would love to talk more!
